things.name: Panama Canal (Miraflores Locks)
things.description: Watch container ships pass through one of the world's greatest engineering achievements

things.name: Casco Viejo (Old Quarter)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Spanish colonial quarter with French and American architecture

things.name: San Blas Islands (Guna Yala)
things.description: 370 palm-fringed islands governed by the Guna indigenous people with perfect beaches

things.name: Metropolitan Natural Park
things.description: Tropical forest within the city limits with sloths, toucans and anteaters

things.name: Biomuseo
things.description: Frank Gehry-designed museum on the continental divide and Panama's biodiversity

things.name: Panama Viejo Archaeological Site
things.description: Ruins of the first European city on the Pacific, razed by pirate Henry Morgan in 1671

things.name: Amador Causeway
things.description: 3km causeway of islands connected to the city with restaurants and the new Biomuseo

things.name: Gamboa Rainforest & Monkey Island
things.description: Boat trip on Gatun Lake to Monkey Island teeming with howler, capuchin and spider monkeys

things.name: Miraflores Visitors Centre
things.description: Best view of the Canal locks with a museum and 3D IMAX film

things.name: Mercado de Mariscos (Fish Market)
things.description: Ceviche and fresh seafood directly from the Pacific at the historic fish market
